'''Hibomehrt-Wyrrgex''' was a technology corporation that dealt with the production and sale of [[Planetary shield/Legends|planetary shields]]. They developed and manufactured the [[DefenStar 5000]] model of [[Planetary shield/Legends|planetary shield]].
